setup: Hero(hp:10, mana:2, atk:3), Enemy(id:E1, hp:5, atk:2, pos:[1,0], type:Hardened), Terrain: Walls:[[1,1]]
expect: Log: 'TURN 0: move(1,1) FAILED: Target is a Wall'. State: turn 1, hero.pos [0,0].

setup: Hero(hp:10, mana:2, atk:3), Enemy(id:E1, hp:10, atk:2, pos:[1,0], type:Glass), Terrain: Conductive:[[1,0]]
expect: Hero deals 6 dmg. Hero takes 2 Counter-Damage (mana 2->0). Rupture triggers. E1 takes floor(3*1*2)=6 dmg. Total E1 damage: 12. E1 destroyed. Log: 'TURN 0: HERO ATTACKED ENEMY E1', 'TURN 0: RUPTURE TRIGGERED! DAMAGE 6 TO [E1]'.

setup: Hero(hp:10, mana:5, atk:3, corrosion:2), Enemy(id:E1, hp:10, pos:[0,2], type:Glass)
expect: 1. Corrosion tick 0. 2. Ranged attack deals floor(3*1)*2=6 dmg. E1.corrosion_dot = 2. Log: 'TURN 0: HERO RANGED ATTACKED ENEMY E1'.

setup: Hero(hp:10, mana:5, atk:3, corrosion:2), Enemy(id:E1, hp:10, pos:[0,2], corrosion_dot:2)
expect: 1. Corrosion tick: E1 takes floor(2*1)=2 dmg. 2. Corrosion decay: E1.corrosion_dot = 1. 3. Move processed. Log: 'TURN 0: CORROSION TICK 2 TO E1', 'TURN 0: HERO MOVED TO [0,0]'.
